name: A24
current_development_slate: Mother Mary (pop star thriller with Charli xcx soundtrack)
submission_notes: A24 operates through established relationships and known producers. Works across indie and prestige genres. Known for taking creative risks.
notes: Leading independent distributor and producer. Valued at $3.5B. Releases 18-20 films annually. Known for discovering emerging talent.

name: Blumhouse Productions
current_development_slate: New projects from directors Lee Cronin and Mike Flanagan
submission_notes: Blumhouse focuses on horror and thriller content. Known for efficient, low-budget production model. Requires producer/agent relationships.
notes: Low-budget horror pioneer. Operates on $3-12M budgets with high ROI model. 112+ films produced. Part of Universal ecosystem.

name: Plan B Entertainment
current_development_slate: The Adventures of Cliff Booth (in post-production)
submission_notes: Plan B specializes in prestige mid-budget films ($15-80M range). Focuses on literary adaptations and awards-caliber content. Requires established representation.
notes: Oscar-winning production company. Specializes in prestige mid-budget films. 38+ films in library. Strong awards strategy.

name: NEON

recent_credits.title: The Seed of the Sacred Fig

current_development_slate: I Love Boosters (Boots Riley, lower $20M range)
submission_notes: NEON focuses on distinctive indie films with strong artistic vision. Masterful marketing and distribution strategy. Requires producer relationships.
notes: 6 Palme d'Or wins. 39 Oscar nominations, 11 wins. Partial stake sold to Department M in 2026. Known for innovative marketing.

name: Searchlight Pictures
current_development_slate: In the Blink of an Eye (2026)
Ready or Not 2: Here I Come (2026)
submission_notes: Searchlight produces and distributes independent and prestige films. Oscar-winning label. Requires established representation and producer relationships.
notes: 8 Best Picture winners. 185+ films in library. Part of Disney. Known for launching careers and discovering talent.

name: Annapurna Pictures
current_development_slate: Moomin film (Rebecca Sugar directing and writing)
Untitled Nick Bruno film (Spielbergian high concept)
submission_notes: Annapurna focuses on prestige content with artistic vision. Active in both live-action and animation divisions. Expanding into game adaptations.
notes: Oscar-winning production company. Two divisions: live-action films and Annapurna Animation. Active in Annapurna Interactive game adaptations.

name: Participant Media
submission_notes: Participant Media ceased operations in April 2024 after 20 years. Skeletal holding company remains to oversee library of 135 films. No new development.
notes: COMPANY CLOSED APRIL 2024. Founded by eBay co-founder Jeff Skoll. 135+ films in library. Focus was socially impactful content and documentaries.

name: Macro
current_development_slate: I Am Not Your Perfect Mexican Daughter (America Ferrera directing debut at Orion Pictures)
submission_notes: MACRO focuses on voices and perspectives of Black people and people of color. Multi-platform content creation. Film Studios division expanded in 2025.
notes: Award-winning multiplatform company founded 2015. Dedicated to diverse voices and perspectives. Operates Macro Film Studios and digital platforms.

name: Killer Films
submission_notes: Killer Films produces independent, artfully-crafted films. NYC-based. Known for supporting experimental and unconventional narratives.
notes: Independent production company founded 1995. 150+ films produced. Known for bold, artistic filmmaking. Strong reputation in arthouse cinema.

name: FilmNation Entertainment
submission_notes: FilmNation produces and finances prestigious independent and international films. Oscar-winning track record. Multi-platform company including theater division.
notes: Prolific production company with 59+ film credits. Operates across film, TV, theater, and podcasts. International presence and portfolio.

name: Topic Studios
current_development_slate: No One Cares (Julianne Moore, Paul Giamatti, Jesse Eisenberg directing)
Wicker (Olivia Colman, acquired by Black Bear)
submission_notes: Topic Studios produces prestigious independent films and documentaries. Focused on character-driven narratives and quality storytelling.
notes: Focused production company founded by former Endeavor executive. TV division shuttered Jan 2024. New multi-year joint venture with Fifth Season for premium TV.

name: Sight Unseen Pictures
submission_notes: Newly established independent production company. Limited public information available on recent slate development.
notes: New production and financing company founded by Julia Lebedev, Eddie Vaisman, and filmmaker Oren Moverman. Limited filmography to date.

name: 3000 Pictures
current_development_slate: Broken Country (Clare Leslie Hall novel adaptation, Reese Witherspoon and Lauren Neustadter producing)
submission_notes: 3000 Pictures specializes in literary-to-screen adaptations. Joint venture with HarperCollins. Focuses on book-to-film content.
notes: Launched 2019 when former Fox 2000 Pictures president and staff joined Sony. Literacy-to-screen division. Named after Elizabeth Gabler.

name: Black Bear Pictures
submission_notes: Black Bear Pictures produces thrillers and genre films. Strong track record with horror and psychological thrillers. Established relationships model.
notes: Active production company with 28+ films. Focus on thrillers and genre content. Strong development pipeline through 2026.

name: Picturestart
current_development_slate: The Masque of the Red Death (in development)
submission_notes: Picturestart creates 'Discovery of Voice' content. Founded by former studio head Erik Feig. Multi-year partnership with Fifth Season for expanded production.
notes: Founded 2023 by Erik Feig. NENT Group investor. Multi-year deal with Fifth Season (Oct 2025) for expanded film and TV co-production.

name: Lionsgate Studios

recent_credits.title: The Hunger Games: Sunrise on the Reaping

submission_notes: Works through established production partners. Starz separation completed May 2025, focusing on ~12 wide theatrical releases annually.
notes: Major studio recently separated from Starz. Strong IP portfolio including Hunger Games, John Wick franchises. Balanced approach to budget tiers.

name: STX Entertainment
current_development_slate: Revived distribution operations under new CEO Peter Coleman
submission_notes: Revived in January 2026 after acquisition by Crown Productions. Targeting $5-20M budget films. Mid-budget focused model.
notes: Founded 2014 by Robert Simonds and Bill McGlashan. Recently revived after ownership change. Specializes in mid-budget ensemble films.

name: Entertainment One (eOne)
submission_notes: Operates under Lionsgate umbrella post-acquisition. eOne Canada rebranded as Lionsgate Canada in June 2024.
notes: UK-based producer acquired by Lionsgate. Strong in animated and family content. Handles theatrical and TV production.

name: Anonymous Content

recent_credits.title: Disclaimer
recent_credits.notes: Directed by Alfonso Cuarón, starring Cate Blanchett

submission_notes: Expanding internationally with joint ventures in Germany, Australia, Brazil, and Italy. AC Studios handles premium content.
notes: Award-winning production company with prestige focus. Strong in limited series and adapted literature. International expansion in progress.

name: Scott Free Productions
parent_deal: 20th Century Studios (select projects), Warner Bros (Blade Runner 2099, Alien: Earth)

recent_credits.title: Alien: Romulus
recent_credits.notes: Directed by Fede Álvarez, $80M budget, $349M worldwide

recent_credits.title: Gladiator II
recent_credits.notes: Directed and produced by Ridley Scott, $240-250M budget

current_development_slate: You Should Be Dancing (Bee Gees biopic)
submission_notes: High-budget exclusive partnership with Ridley Scott. Strong genre focus on sci-fi and epic narratives. Series adaptations strategy.
notes: Named after artist and filmmaker. Ridley Scott-centric company with significant IP in sci-fi and action franchises. Recent CAA signing marks new representation.

name: Bad Robot Productions
current_development_slate: A Hope More Powerful Than the Sea
submission_notes: J.J. Abrams directing first feature in years. Two-year Warner Bros. first-look deal closed December 2024. 26 films in development.
notes: Founded by J.J. Abrams. Strong in mystery-box narratives and high-concept sci-fi. Previous $250M deal; current deal less expensive given market conditions.

name: Legendary Entertainment

recent_credits.title: Godzilla x Kong: The New Empire

current_development_slate: Street Fighter (Oct 2026, first under Paramount deal)
submission_notes: Paramount deal excludes China distribution (handled by Legendary East). Warner Bros. continues to distribute select Legendary franchises.
notes: Major producer of tentpole franchises. Recent Sony deal lapse due to underperforming releases. Strong in monster movies and video game adaptations.

name: Monkeypaw Productions
current_development_slate: No Drama Initiative shorts (5 films premiered at TIFF 2025)
submission_notes: Jordan Peele-led company focused on horror and social commentary. No Drama Initiative nurtures emerging horror filmmakers. Recent development layoffs.
notes: Horror-focused with themes of social commentary. Partnership with TIFF and Universal on emerging filmmaker initiative. Known for Peele's directorial work.

name: Regency Enterprises (New Regency)

recent_credits.title: Deep Water
recent_credits.notes: Directed by Adrian Lyne, first film in nearly two decades

submission_notes: Founded 1991 by Arnon Milchan. 59 completed films, 33 in development, 3 in pre-production. Balanced film and TV approach.
notes: Long-established independent producer with robust pipeline. Strong in prestige drama and thrillers. Strategic partnerships with Netflix and Disney+.

name: Color Force
parent_deal: Sony Pictures (overall film deal, 2024), FX (renewed through 2027)
current_development_slate: American Love Story (2025, Carolyn Bessette-Kennedy focus)
Sunrise on the Reaping (Hunger Games adaptation)
submission_notes: Founded 2007 by Nina Jacobson. Recent Sony film deal with Khaliah Neal as head of film. Strong in adaptation of literary properties.
notes: Produced Hunger Games franchise. Strong in prestige television and literary adaptations. Renewed FX deal through 2027.

name: Temple Hill Entertainment
current_development_slate: Children of Blood and Bone (Jan 2027, Paramount)
submission_notes: Established 2006 by Wyck Godfrey and Marty Bowen. 50 films in development. Produced Twilight and Maze Runner franchises.
notes: Horror specialists with commercial sensibility. Strong franchise producers (Twilight, Maze Runner). Recent partnership with Protagonist Pictures.

name: 21 Laps Entertainment
submission_notes: Founded and run by Shawn Levy. Exclusive Netflix partnership with strong IP in Stranger Things. Expanding into feature film production.
notes: Netflix exclusive partnership. Produced Stranger Things phenomenon. Record-breaking year with Deadpool film. Expanding to feature films and animation.

name: Vertigo Entertainment

recent_credits.title: Salem's Lot
recent_credits.notes: HBO Max premiere, Stephen King adaptation

submission_notes: Founded by Roy Lee. Partnership with AWA Studios for horror content pipeline. 42 films in development.
notes: Horror and thriller specialist. AWA partnership creates new storytelling pipeline. Strong in Stephen King adaptations. 36 projects in production.

name: Wayfarer Studios

recent_credits.title: Eleanor the Great
recent_credits.notes: Directed by Scarlett Johansson, Cannes world premiere

submission_notes: Co-founded by Justin Baldoni. Self-financing model. Focus on inspirational and socially conscious content across formats.
notes: Independent model with self-financing. Strong in socially conscious content. Documentary division active. Diverse content across platforms.

name: Range Media Partners
current_development_slate: Lou Reed biopic (based on 'Lou Reed: The King of New York')
submission_notes: Co-production agreement with FilmNation targets 4-6 films per year. Expanding development pipeline with director partnerships.
notes: Banner 2024 year with prestige productions. Partnership with Google on AI-focused content. Working with established and emerging directors.

name: wiip
submission_notes: Does not accept unsolicited submissions. Only accepts material through recognized literary agents.
notes: Talent-first production company known for prestige limited series and character-driven drama. Acquired by South Korean company in 2021. Emmy award-winning credits.

name: A+E Studios
submission_notes: Established studio unit of A+E Networks. Submit through agents.
notes: Award-winning studio unit of A+E Networks focusing on high-quality scripted entertainment for linear and non-linear platforms.

name: Imagine Television
submission_notes: Contact through agents. Selective with submissions.
notes: Prestigious company exploring strategic sale. Known for high-profile reboots and franchise projects. Strong track record in both TV and film.

name: Amblin Television
submission_notes: Only accepts submissions through established representation.
notes: Premier production company founded by Steven Spielberg. Known for prestige television and films. Recent deal with Universal for distribution and co-financing.

name: Fremantle
submission_notes: Submit through established agencies or via Fremantle's development contacts.
notes: Major European super-indie with global reach. 2024 restructuring merged US and Europe scripted operations. Recently acquired Beach House Pictures and Asacha Media Group.

name: Sony Pictures Television
submission_notes: Submit through major agencies only.
notes: Major studio division of Sony. Large slate across multiple genres. Strong track record with streaming platforms. Kids content division produces Emmy-winning content.

name: Universal Content Productions (UCP)
submission_notes: Submit through agents. Part of NBCUniversal infrastructure.
notes: Major streaming and cable production company. Known for genre content and franchise adaptations. Evolved from Universal Cable Productions to UCP in 2019.

name: 20th Television
submission_notes: ABC's flagship production arm following ABC Signature dissolution in October 2024.
notes: Major Disney subsidiary. Absorbed ABC Signature in October 2024. Large slate across network and streaming platforms.

name: ABC Signature
submission_notes: DISSOLVED October 1, 2024. Operations folded into 20th Television.
notes: Closed in October 2024 as part of Disney restructuring. Legacy shows now produced by 20th Television including Grey's Anatomy and Criminal Minds: Evolution.

name: Lionsgate Television
current_development_slate: John Wick: Under the High Table
submission_notes: Submit through representatives.
notes: Major television producer with 20+ premium series in development. Expanded significantly via December 2023 eOne acquisition. Strong presence across all major platforms.

name: Village Roadshow Television
submission_notes: Submit through agents.
notes: Major production company. Reported Chapter 11 bankruptcy filing in March 2025 due to studio expansion costs, staff layoffs, and arbitration disputes. Operations may be impacted.

name: Sierra/Affinity
submission_notes: Primarily handles third-party representation and financing. Limited unsolicited material.
notes: Independent film finance, production and foreign sales company. Formed 2011 from merger of Sierra Pictures and Affinity International. eOne subsidiary focuses on global marketplace appeal.

name: Fifth Season (formerly Endeavor Content)
parent_deal: CJ ENM (South Korean conglomerate, 75% owned) / Toho (Japanese, 25% owned as of Dec 2023)
submission_notes: Submit through established representation.
notes: Rebranded from Endeavor Content in September 2022. Now under CJ ENM/Toho ownership. Produces $1B+ annual slate across prestige TV and film. Known for high-end prestige content.

name: Endeavor Content
submission_notes: REBRANDED. See Fifth Season for current operations.
notes: Rebranded to Fifth Season in September 2022. No longer operates under Endeavor Content name.

name: MRC (Media Rights Capital)
submission_notes: Submit through agents and representatives.
notes: Prestigious independent production company founded 2004. Develops, finances and produces film and television. Strong prestige drama track record across HBO, Netflix, and other platforms.
